basics.name: Ben Duncan
basics.label: AI/ML Engineer | MLOps Specialist
basics.summary: AI/ML Engineer specializing in architecting large-scale distributed systems and MLOps infrastructure. Expert in deploying complex models on Kubernetes, optimizing inference for high-dimensional data processing, and building modular, scalable AI services for constrained and air-gapped environments.

work.name: Onebrief
work.summary: Architecting and implementing scalable AI services and distributed infrastructure for edge computing and constrained environments.
highlights: Implemented a scalable, modular service for deploying models on Kubernetes in constrained environments
Architected multi-agent structured graph workflows and developed Model Context Protocol (MCP) Servers to expose internal application tools for autonomous agent orchestration
Deployed fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLM) providing AI summarization capabilities
Created machine learning and advanced algorithm services for document layout detection and extraction

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Full-lifecycle leadership of MLOps platforms and data-driven product strategy for large-scale engineering teams.
highlights: Owned ML operations including Kubeflow pipelines, models registry development, and model framework tools
Deployed and maintained tools and infrastructure built on Kubernetes and AWS cloud technology to support TB-scale model training and evaluation
Wore several hats as a product owner and engineer in designing, building, deploying and maintaining data products and ML models in an agile environment
Led the data operations team in data collection, ETL pipelines, and developing data access tools and APIs

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Driving technical strategy for high-performance querying and large-scale distributed data solutions.
highlights: Led an agile scrum team in the development of a TB scale data storage and retrieval platform
Designed Airflow ETL pipelines for ingesting structured and unstructured data from various sources into object storage
Built Python interfaces and tools for querying, storing, and accessing data assets using clean code principles

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.summary: Facilitating delivery of expert systems and telemetry analysis tools using robust CI/CD and containerization.
highlights: Leveraged containerization and CI/CD to create a robust development and delivery environment
Generated and prepared simulated missile telemetry data for ingestion into Machine Learning pipelines
Developed Python and Tableau tools for high-performance data processing, analysis, and visualization
